name: INJ-001
description: User-supplied text in submission fields is sanitized/validated server-side before storage — not merely rendered inert by the current client
descriptionHtml: User-supplied text in submission fields is sanitized/validated server-side before storage — not merely rendered inert by the current client
statusMessage: INJ fixture: probe submission was not found via the API after completing the wizard.
